steps.title: Find the size note
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize Tepeapulco's size. Of the notes, only one gives a measurement of size: Tepeapulco covers roughly 243 km². A choice that does not include that area cannot accomplish the stated goal.

steps.title: Use the area measurement
steps.content: The matching choice directly states Tepeapulco's area. Choice A discusses municipal services, Choice B discusses public services in Tepeapulco, and Choice C says Tepeapulco is one of 84 municipalities; none of those choices gives its size. The answer is D.
